title: Syllogisms
description: Master Venn diagrams to solve statement and conclusion problems.

title: Blood Relations
description: Learn family tree techniques to map complex relationships quickly.

title: Coding-Decoding
description: Identify hidden patterns in letter and number coding.

title: Direction Sense
description: Solve spatial reasoning problems involving movements and angles.

title: Seating Arrangements
description: Tackle complex circular, linear, and matrix arrangement puzzles.

title: Logical Puzzles
description: Develop analytical skills for solving grid-based logic problems.

title: Data Sufficiency
description: Determine if given statements are sufficient to answer a specific question.

title: Statement & Assumption
description: Analyze implicit premises behind given statements.

title: Ranking & Order
description: Solve problems involving relative positions in a queue or sequence.

title: Calendar & Clock Problems
description: Master shortcuts for finding days of the week and angles between clock hands.
